MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to CCP Section 583.210 and Section 583.250. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
